Functions for handling phone call UI events in the Pebble firmware.

# Purpose
This C header file declares a set of functions for handling phone call user interface events. It includes the necessary headers, `kernel/events.h` and `services/normal/phone_call_util.h`, which provide essential types and utilities for managing phone call interactions. The functions declared in this file manage various call states and actions, such as handling incoming and outgoing calls ([`phone_ui_handle_incoming_call`](<#phone_ui_handle_incoming_call>), [`phone_ui_handle_outgoing_call`](<#phone_ui_handle_outgoing_call>)), managing missed calls ([`phone_ui_handle_missed_call`](<#phone_ui_handle_missed_call>)), and controlling call visibility ([`phone_ui_handle_call_hide`](<#phone_ui_handle_call_hide>)). Additionally, it provides functions to handle the start and end of calls ([`phone_ui_handle_call_start`](<#phone_ui_handle_call_start>), [`phone_ui_handle_call_end`](<#phone_ui_handle_call_end>)) and to manage caller identification ([`phone_ui_handle_caller_id`](<#phone_ui_handle_caller_id>)). These functions are designed to interface with a user interface system to provide feedback and control over phone call events.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `kernel/events.h`
- `services/normal/phone_call_util.h`
- `stdbool.h`
